request: Deploy the release to production and verify the service is healthy.

rejected_candidates.reason: Implementation can change code, but production deployment requires runtime safety gates.

routing_reasons: Production deployment is a governed runtime action.
The route requires implementation context and quality acceptance evidence.
why_primary: deployment_safety owns the runtime gates for production deployment.

why_not_other_candidates.reason: Implementation alone would miss backup, rollback and runtime inventory gates.
